languages.title: Puo
languages.subtitle: Tlhopha puo e e dirisiwang mo tirisong yotlhe.
languages.noResults: Ga go na dipuo tse di tsamaelanang le patlo ya gago.

phone.label: Nomoro ya mogala
phone.searchCountry: Batla naga, khoutu, kgotsa ketapele ya go daela
phone.noCountries: Ga go na dinaga tse di tshwanang le patlo ya gago.
phone.countryButton: Fetola naga, ga jaana %{country} tlhakanya le %{callingCode}
phone.tooShort: Nomoro ena ya mohala e kgutshwane haholo.
phone.tooLong: Nomoro ena ya mohala e telele haholo.
phone.invalid: Tsenya nomoro ya mogala e e dirang ya naga e e tlhophilweng.
phone.valid: Nomoro ya mogala ya boditšhabatšhaba e e amogelesegang

auth.onboardingTagline: Molekane wa pabalesego ya motho ka namana mo dinakong tse di fa gare ga “Ke siame” le “Ke tlhoka thuso.”
auth.continueOnboarding: Tswelela ka go tsenngwa mo sekepeng
auth.createSubtitle: Tlhopha mokgwa wa go saenela go sireletsa kerafo ya gago ya pabalesego.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ga re a kgona go wetsa go tsena. Tlhola kgolagano ya gago o bo o leka gape.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Go saenela ga go yo
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Go dirisa thulaganyo ya tlhabololo ya selegae. Go Tsena ga Native Google go dira mo kagong ya tlhabololo.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Para jaanong kgotsa tswelela o e tsenye moragonyana.
auth.northStarBody: Seapara sa VL01 se ka tsosa diphallo tsa polokeho ka dipompo le ditshupo tse telele tsa ho tobetsa.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Molekane wa gago yo o bonolo wa pabalesego mo mmapeng le mo megaleng.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear e ka thusa ka mokgwa wa lapeng, mokgwa wa mohlokomedi, mokgwa wa tshohanyetso, di-call tsa seipato, le tshehetso ya lentswe.

permissions.locationSubtitle: E dirisediwa mmapa, mafelo a a kotsi, go goroga ka pabalesego, le bokao jwa SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving e kopa lefelo gore batlhokomedi ba kgone go tlhaloganya gore thuso e ka tlhokega kae. O ka fetola seno moragonyana mo Diseting.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Dikitsiso di tshegetsa go tsena le ditiragalo tsa tshoganyetso.
permissions.notificationsBody: Re dirisa fela dikitsiso tsa dipotso tsa pabalesego, dintšhwafatso tsa tshoganyetso, le dikgopotso tse o di kgontshang.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Lefelo le boloka bokao jwa pabalesego bo nepagetse
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e dirisa lefelo la gago la mmapa wa pabalesego, mafelo a a kotsi, kabelano ka bonako, le bokao jwa SOS. O ka fetola seno moragonyana mo Diseting.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Ditsiboso tsa pabalesego di tlhoka dikitsiso
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e romela dikgopotso tsa go tsena, dintšhwafatso tsa tshoganyetso, le dipotso tsa pabalesego tse o di kgontshang. Ga re dirise dikitsiso tsa dipapatso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Maekerofouno e naya dipitso tsa pabalesego maatla
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e dirisa maekerofouno ya gago fela fa o simolola AI molekane kgotsa mogala wa pabalesego.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth e golaganya sediriswa sa gago se se aparwang
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e dirisa Bluetooth go kopanya le mabenyane a NorthStar, go bala seemo sa kgolagano, le go tlhotlheletsa diphallo tsa pabalesego go tswa mo go se se aparwang.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e dirisa khamera fela fa o tlhopha go tsaya senepe sa porofaele kgotsa go abelana setshwantsho sa pabalesego.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving e boloka kelelo eno e le teng go tswa mo Diseting le mo dashebotong.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Tlhopha lentswe le le tsamayang le lone le le utlwalang le babalesegile go le utlwa.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Go ela tlhoko go go didimetseng go bona pabalesego ya letsatsi le letsatsi.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Abelana bokao le batho ba o ba tshepang.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Dipompo tse hlano di ka nyolohela ho SOS le ditsiboso tsa mohlokomedi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Tlhama lebaka le lentle la go tlogela seemo se se sa phuthologang.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Simolola mogala wa molekane wa nako ya nnete fa o tlhoka tshegetso.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Leka diphallo tsa polokeho pontshong ya kgatello e tlase.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Boloka mabenyane a le gaufi fa o ntse o sekaseka.
jewelry.noDevices: Ga go ise go bonwe didiriswa tsa NorthStar tse di gaufi.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth go sekaseka ga go a kgona go simolola. Tsweetswee leka gape.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ga re a bona mabenyane a a gaufi. Tlhola Bluetooth, boloka NorthStar e gaufi, o bo o leka gape.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth go sekaseka ga go a kgona go simolola. Tlhola Bluetooth phitlhelelo mme o leke gape.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Phitlhelelo ya sediriswa se se gaufi e timilwe. Letla Bluetooth phitlhelelo mo Diseting, o bo o leka gape.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar e tsere nako e telele thata go golagana. E atametse mme o leke gape.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ga re a kgona go golagana le NorthStar. Tlhola gore a e tšhajilwe e bile e gaufi, o bo o leka gape.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Ga go ise go nne le didiriswa tse di gaufi
jewelry.emptyMessage: Boloka NorthStar e tšhajilwe e bile e le gaufi le founo eno, o bo o sekaseka gape.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Ke batla didiriswa tsa NorthStar tse di gaufi...

home.subtitle: Dasheboto ya molekane wa pabalesego
home.readyBody: Lentswe, mmapa, mabenyane, le balebedi ba pompo e le nngwe.
home.noDevice: Ga go na sediriswa se se golagantsweng

map.title: Mmepe wa pabalesego
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go tebopele; Mapbox e ranola mo kagong ya tlhabololo.
map.updateFailed: Ga re a kgona go tlhabolola lefelo la gago. Tsweetswee leka gape.
map.notRequested: Location access was not requested. O ka e kgontsha moragonyana go tswa mo Diseting.
map.permissionOff: Location access is off. E kgontsha mo Diseting go tsenya mmapa wa pabalesego mo gare ga gago.
map.timeout: Your location is taking longer than expected. Sutela golo gongwe go go nang le letshwao le le bonalang sentle mme o leke gape.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Ga go ise go bolokwe mafelo
map.savedEmptyMessage: Mafelo a a ikanyegang a o a bolokang a tla tlhagelela fano gore o kgone go a bona ka bonako.

zones.lowLighting: Lefelo le le nang le lesedi le le kwa tlase

map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.offlineCompanion: Molekane yo o seng mo inthaneteng
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Go golagana ka pabalesego le molekane wa gago wa lentswe...
safetyCall.useOffline: Dirisa tsala ya ntle le inthanete
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Thaepa fa go bua go le thata
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Motlotlo wa lona o simolola fano
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Simolola call kgotsa thaepa molaetsa fa o siametse.

history.clearMessage: Seno se tlosa melaetsa e e bolokilweng ya AI mo sedirisweng seno.
history.cannotUndo: Seno ga se ka ke sa dirololwa.
history.title: hisitori ya motlotlo
history.subtitle: AI melaetsa e e tsamayang le yone e e bolokilweng mo sedirisweng seno.
history.empty: Ga go na metlotlo e e bolokilweng.
history.emptyTitle: Ga go ise go nne le dipuisano
history.emptyMessage: Dipuisano tsa gago tsa AI tsa molekane di tla tlhagelela fano morago ga mogala wa gago wa ntlha.
history.loadFailed: Ga re a kgona go laisa hisitori ya motlotlo. Tsweetswee leka gape.
history.clearFailed: Ga re a kgona go phimola hisitori ya motlotlo. Tsweetswee leka gape.
history.deleteFailed: Ga re a kgona go phimola motlotlo oo. Tsweetswee leka gape.

voices.title: Mantswe a me a pitso ya pabalesego
voices.subtitle: Tlhopha lentswe la molekane le le utlwalang le siametse go le utlwa.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Tsweetswee leka go tlhopha lentswe gape.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Sampole eno ya lentswe ga e a kgona go tshamekiwa. Tsweetswee leka gape.

bestie.name: Tsala
bestie.description: e e phatsimang, e e tlhomamisang, e e nang le motlotlo

muscleMan.name: Monna wa mesifa
muscleMan.description: go itshepa, go sireletsa, go rotloetsa

settings.offlineMode: Mokgwa wa go tswa mo inthaneteng
settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Dirisa dikarabo tsa molekane tse di kopantsweng fa neteweke kgotsa dintlha tsa boitshupo tsa Hume di se teng.
settings.privacyBody: Romelantle kgotsa phimola tshedimosetso ya selegae e e bolokilweng mo sedirisweng seno.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ga e kgone go romela tshedimosetso ya gago kwa ntle gone jaanong.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Seno se tlosa porofaele ya gago, diseting, mabitso a tshoganyetso, hisitori ya motlotlo, dikgopotso tsa tetlelelo, le nako ya netefatso ya selegae mo sedirisweng seno.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ga e kgone go phimola tshedimosetso ya selegae gone jaanong.
settings.linkFailed: Ga e kgone go bula kgokagano

sections.languageSubtitle: Segokaganyi le puo ya tetlelelo ya tsamaiso
sections.companionSubtitle: Ditlhopho tsa lentswe le tsa kwa ntle ga inthanete
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, batlhokomedi, le batho ba ba ka ikgolaganyang le bone ka nako ya tshoganyetso
sections.accountSubtitle: Nako ya gago ya ga jaana ya VeryLoving

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ga re a kgona go boloka kgetho eo. Tsweetswee leka gape.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Thulaganyo ya gago e sa ntse e dira. Tsweetswee leka gape.

contacts.title: Magolagano a tshoganyetso
contacts.subtitle: Batho ba ba ikanyegang ba ba leng teng ka nako ya diphallo tsa pabalesego.
contacts.name: Leina
contacts.empty: Ga go ise go tsenngwe mabitso a tshoganyetso.
contacts.emptyTitle: Ga go ise go nne le magolagano a tshoganyetso
contacts.emptyMessage: Tsenya motho yo o mo tshepang gore a nne a siametse fa kelelo ya pabalesego e mo tlhoka.
contacts.removeMessage: Motho yo ga a kitla a tlhola a tlhagelela mo kelelong ya gago ya tshoganyetso.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ga re a kgona go boloka kgolagano eno. Tlhola dintlha mme o leke gape.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ga re a kgona go tlosa kgolagano eno. Tsweetswee leka gape.

device.title: Taolo ya sediriswa
device.subtitle: Laola sediriswa sa gago sa NorthStar.
device.none: Ga go na didiriswa tse di golagantsweng

friends.title: Ditsala
friends.subtitle: Batlhokomedi, dikopo, le kerafo ya tshoganyetso.
friends.emptyTitle: Sediko sa gago sa pabalesego ga se na sepe
friends.emptyMessage: Ditsala tse di ikanyegang le batlhokomedi ba tla tlhagelela fano fa ba sena go tsenngwa.

emergency.title: Maemo a tshoganyetso SOS
emergency.subtitle: Oketsa fela fa o tlhoka tshegetso ya ka bonako.
emergency.body: Se se tla itsise kelelo ya gago ya pabalesego le go baakanyetsa batho ba o ka ikgolaganyang le bone ka tshoganyetso.
emergency.notificationBody: Kelelo ya gago ya tshoganyetso e siame.
emergency.addContact: Tsenya leina la tshoganyetso mo Diseting.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Setlhogo sa go abelana lefelo se siametse go dirisiwa. Golaganya ntlha ya bofelo ya kabelano ya morago go romela dikgokagano tse di tshelang.

quickShare.title: Kabelano ka bonako
quickShare.subtitle: Kelelo ya kabelo ya lefelo e siame.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pompo
capybearTap.subtitle: Tobetsa gabedi NorthStar ya gago go latlhela namune ya pabalesego.
capybearTap.body: Tsela ya ditshupo e siametse go tsenngwa ga dithapo tsa tiragalo ya BLE.

debug.title: VeryLoving tsebe ya go baakanya diphoso
debug.subtitle: Tsela ya tlhabololo fela.

errors.voiceOffline: O lebega o se mo inthaneteng. Molaetsa wa gago o tla romelwa fa o golagana gape.
errors.voiceQueued: Molaetsa o bolokilwe. E tla romelwa fa molekane wa lentswe a golagana gape.
errors.voiceRetrying: Ke leka go romela molaetsa wa gago gape...
errors.voiceConnecting: Go golagana ka pabalesego le molekane wa gago wa lentswe...
errors.microphone: Go tlhokega go dirisa maekerofouno mo megaleng ya lentswe. O ka e kgontsha mo Diseting, kgotsa wa thaepa molaetsa boemong jwa yone.
errors.billing: Molekane wa lentswe wa inthanete ga a yo ka nakwana. O ka tswelela ka molekane yo o seng mo inthaneteng.
errors.authentication: Molekane wa lentswe ga a kgona go netefatsa thulaganyo eno. Saenela go tsena gape kgotsa dirisa molekane wa ntle le inthanete gone jaanong.
errors.timeout: Molekane wa lentswe o tsere nako e telele thata go araba. Tlhola kgolagano ya gago o bo o leka gape.
errors.network: Ga re a kgona go fitlhelela molekane wa lentswe. Tlhola kgolagano ya gago, o bo o leka gape kgotsa tswelela o se mo inthaneteng.
errors.genericVoice: Sengwe se ne sa kgaotsa mogala wa lentswe. Leka gape, kgotsa tswelela ka molekane yo o seng mo inthaneteng.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving e tlhoka go kgona go dirisa maekerofouno go bona pabalesego le AI megala e e tsamayang le yone.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving e dirisa lefelo la gago la mmapa wa pabalesego le dikarolo tsa pabalesego tse di gaufi.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving e dirisa Bluetooth go golagana le mabenyane a gago a pabalesego a NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Kgetho eno ya go tsena ga e yo mo tokololong eno.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mokgwa wa pontsho o dirisa fela tshedimosetso ya teko e e mo sedirisiweng. Ditirelo tse di golagantsweng ga di a netefadiwa, mme nako eno e simolola sesha fa porokeramo e laisiwa gape.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Khoutu ya netefatso ga e a siama kgotsa e feletswe ke nako. Kopa khoutu e ntšha mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Go lekilwe go tsena makgetlo a le mantsi. Leta nakwana, mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Netefatso ya go tsena e tsere nako e telele thata. Tlhola kgolagano ya gago mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ga re a kgona go fitlhelela tirelo ya go tsena. Tlhola kgolagano ya gago mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Nako ya gago e fedile. Tsena gape.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Mmapa wa pabalesego ga o a kgona go laisiwa. Tlhola kgolagano ya gago mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Lefelo la gago la jaanong ga le yo. Go bontshiwa lefelo la gago la bofelo le le bolokilweng go tswa ka %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ga re a kgona go abelana lefelo la gago. Tlhola tetla ya lefelo mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Lefelo la me le le rekotilweng ka %{capturedAt} ke leno:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Lefelo la me la bofelo le le bolokilweng, le le rekotilweng ka %{capturedAt}, ke leno:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Tetla ya Bluetooth e timilwe. E bulele mo Ditlhophong, mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth e timilwe. E bulele, mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Go kopanya ka Bluetooth ga go yo mo sedirisiweng kgotsa mo tokololong eno.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ga re a kgona go bona NorthStar. E boloke e le gaufi, tlhola Bluetooth, mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ga go na didirisiwa tsa NorthStar tse di bonweng gaufi. E boloke e le gaufi mme o batle gape.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ga re a kgona go golagana le NorthStar. Netefatsa gore e na le motlakase e bile e gaufi, mme o leke gape.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ga re a kgona go boloka lefelo leno. Leka gape.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Sedirisiwa sa go letsa se butswe; mogala ga o a netefadiwa.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Go khansetswe; ga go na mogala o o dirilweng.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Go ne go se na mogolagani wa tshoganyetso; ga go na mogala o o dirilweng.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Sedirisiwa sa go letsa ga se a kgona go bulega; ga go na mogala o o dirilweng.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Teko ya bofelo ya SOS ga e a kgona go netefadiwa.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Mothusi wa lentswe ga a yo jaanong. Leka gape moragonyana kgotsa tswelela ka mothusi yo o sa tlhokeng inthanete.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.
